results.title: Prismatic adds native large data sync for integrations
results.description: B2B software teams can now handle onboarding, migrations and bulk refreshes without separate synchronisation tools as Prismatic folds them into one platform.

results.title: Kore.ai appoints two chiefs to drive enterprise AI growth
results.description: The restructure puts sales and customer delivery under new leaders as enterprise buyers demand stronger governance, support and reliability from AI agents.

results.title: meshIQ benchmark finds no single messaging broker wins
results.description: The benchmark underscores that broker choice depends on workload, with each contender excelling in different durable messaging tests.

results.title: GitHub slashes public bug bounty payouts as AI report flood buries its security team
results.description: Code shack also putting new limits on first-time researchers, and reserving the biggest rewards for a hand-picked group of proven hunters
